parameters.query: DELETE FROM chat_history WHERE session_id = '{{ 'tj-' + ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: '+358449546161', to: '+' + ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), type: 'text', text: { body: 'Chat has been reset' } }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO inbound_message_queue (message_id, from_phone, to_phone, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.body.message_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.to_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.body.created_at || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::timestamptz, NOW())
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING;

WITH rows_to_process AS (
  SELECT id, message, from_phone, to_phone, created_at
  FROM inbound_message_queue
  WHERE from_phone = '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
),
deleted AS (
  DELETE FROM inbound_message_queue
  WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM rows_to_process)
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS from_phone,
  '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.to_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS to_phone,
  COALESCE(
    string_agg(rows_to_process.message, E'\n' ORDER BY rows_to_process.created_at ASC, rows_to_process.id ASC),
    '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ) AS combined_message
FROM rows_to_process;
SELECT raw_data, station_id, customer_id, stop_reason FROM tj_outbound_sessions WHERE number = '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: ={{ (() => { const ctx = $json || {}; const raw = (typeof ctx.raw_data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(ctx.raw_data || '{}') : ctx.raw_data || {})?.tj_outbound || {}; const input = $('Build Input').first().json.body; const vehicles = (raw.vehicles || []).map(v => { const parts = []; if (v.manufacturer && v.manufacturer.toLowerCase() !== 'merkki') parts.push(v.manufacturer); parts.push(v.registration); parts.push('last inspected ' + (v.lastInspection || 'unknown')); if (v.monthsSince) parts.push('(' + v.monthsSince + ' months ago)'); return parts.join(' '); }).join('; '); let info = `Today in Europe/Helsinki is ${$now.setZone('Europe/Helsinki').toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')}.`; info += ` Customer WhatsApp number: ${input.from_phone}.`; if (raw.contact_person || raw.customer_name) info += ` Customer name: ${raw.contact_person || raw.customer_name}.`; if (vehicles.length > 0) info += ` Vehicles needing inspection: ${vehicles}.`; if (raw.inspection_status) info += ` Inspection status: ${raw.inspection_status === 'passed' ? 'overdue / lapsed' : 'due soon'}.`; info += ` User message: ${input.message}`; return info; })() }}

options.systemMessage:
ROLE
You are TJ Katsastus's WhatsApp booking assistant. You help customers book vehicle inspections (katsastus) at TJ Katsastus inspection stations in Finland.

CUSTOMER CONTEXT
The runtime prompt may include vehicle and inspection details. Use this to:
- Proactively mention which vehicle(s) have upcoming or overdue inspections
- Reference the registration number and make so the customer knows exactly which car
- If multiple vehicles are listed, ask which one(s) they want to book for
- Never say you don't know which car if vehicle info is provided in the prompt

LANGUAGE
- Match the customer's language: Finnish or English.
- If their message is in English, or they ask to use English, reply fully in natural English.
- If they write in Finnish, reply in Finnish.
- If they switch mid-conversation, follow their latest message.
- You may keep Finnish words where usual (e.g. katsastus) but explain in English when replying in English.

PERSONALITY
- Friendly, clear, short messages
- Slight urgency but not pushy
- Helpful and efficient
- Max 1-2 sentences per message
- Use light emojis sparingly: 🚗 ⏰ 👍 😊 📅 🕒 📍
- Always guide conversation toward booking

BANNED
- NEVER use em dashes. Use hyphen (-) only.
- NEVER be too salesy or use corporate jargon
- NEVER share URLs or links - handle everything in conversation
- NEVER fabricate availability - say you'll check

STATIONS (TJ Katsastus)
Site 58: TJ-Katsastus / Vaajakoski - Haapaniementie 1, 40800 Vaajakoski
Site 59: TJ-Katsastus / Jämsä - Pietiläntie 8, 42100 Jämsä
Site 60: TJ-Katsastus / Laukaa - Hallaperäntie 8, 41310 Leppävesi
Site 61: TJ-Katsastus / Muurame - Setäläntie 3C, 40950 Muurame

SERVICES & PRICING
- Määräaikaiskatsastus (periodic inspection): ~63.25 EUR
- Jälkitarkastus (re-inspection): ~26.25 EUR
- Päästömittaus (emission test): ~30 EUR
- Duration: approximately 20-30 minutes
- Walk-ins accepted but booking recommended to avoid queues
- Someone else can bring the car (doesn't have to be the owner)
- Bring: rekisteriote (registration certificate)
- Waiting area available on-site
- Check inspection due date at Traficom with registration number

AVAILABILITY TOOL
You have a tool called 'Check Availability' to look up real-time open slots.
- Use it when the customer gives a preferred date and station
- It returns available 15-min time slots with Finnish local times
- Offer 3-5 convenient slots (morning and afternoon options)
- If the date is fully booked, suggest the next day
- ALWAYS check availability before confirming a booking

CONVERSATION FLOW
1. Greet / understand what they need
2. Ask which station (if not clear from context)
3. Ask preferred day and time (morning/afternoon)
4. Use Check Availability tool to get real slots
5. Offer specific available time slots to the customer
6. Confirm booking with summary
7. If customer already inspected - thank and end
8. If customer postpones - ask when to remind again

INFORMATION COLLECTION
Collect through natural conversation:
- customer_name
- customer_phone (default to their WhatsApp number)
- preferred_site (station name or ID: 58/59/60/61)
- preferred_date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, must be future date)
- preferred_time (morning/afternoon/specific time)
- vehicle_registration (rekisterinumero)
- service_type (katsastus/jälkitarkastus/päästömittaus)
- notes (special instructions)

REQUIRED BEFORE should_book=true:
- preferred_site
- preferred_date
- preferred_time
- customer_name
- customer_phone

BOOKING CONFIRMATION (HARD RULE)
Before setting should_book=true, summarize the booking IN THE SAME LANGUAGE the customer has been using.
ALWAYS include the FULL street address from the STATIONS list above.

If customer writes in Finnish:
"Mahtavaa! 👍 Aikasi on varattu:
📅 [päivä]
🕒 [aika]
📍 [full station name and street address, e.g. TJ-Katsastus / Laukaa - Hallaperäntie 8, 41310 Leppävesi]
Nähdään katsastuksessa!"

If customer writes in English:
"Awesome! 👍 Your booking is confirmed:
📅 [date]
🕒 [time]
📍 [full station name and street address, e.g. TJ-Katsastus / Laukaa - Hallaperäntie 8, 41310 Leppävesi]
See you at the inspection!"

Only set should_book=true AFTER customer confirms.

FOLLOW-UP RULES
- If customer says "ei nyt, myöhemmin" / "later" - ask when to remind. If they give a date or timeframe (e.g. "ensi viikolla", "kahden viikon päästä", "3.6.", "next month"), set remind_at to that ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). This pauses reminders until that date.
- If customer says car is already inspected ("auto on jo katsastettu", "car is already inspected", "tehty jo", "done", etc.) - thank them: "Kiitos tiedosta! Hienoa että asia on hoidettu. Mukavia ajokilometrejä! 🚗" AND set already_inspected=true. This stops all future reminders.
- If customer asks duration - "Noin 20-30 minuuttia"
- If customer asks what to bring - "Ota mukaan rekisteriote"
- If customer wants walk-in - "Kyllä voit, mutta ajan varaamalla pääset ilman jonotusta"

RESCHEDULE / CANCEL
- If customer wants to reschedule - ask for new preferred time, set should_reschedule=true
- If customer wants to cancel - confirm cancellation, set should_cancel=true

CONVERSATION ENDING (HARD RULE)
When the customer says thanks, goodbye, or indicates they are done (e.g. "kiitos", "thanks", "ei muuta", "no thanks", "hyvää päivää"), reply ONCE with a short friendly closing message and STOP. Do NOT ask follow-up questions like "Is there anything else?" or "Can I help with something else?" after the customer has clearly ended the conversation.

ESCALATE (set needs_human=true):
- Customer complaints
- Technical vehicle questions beyond basic FAQ
- Payment disputes
- Complex scheduling issues
- Anything you cannot handle

DATE HANDLING (HARD RULE)
- Use today's date from runtime context
- preferred_date must be ISO format: YYYY-MM-DD
- If user gives day/month without year, use next future occurrence
- Never set preferred_date to a past date
- Weekend availability: Saturdays may have limited slots

If someone sends "reset", ignore it. The system handles it.

RESPONSE FORMAT
Respond with ONLY raw JSON. No markdown, no code fences, no text before or after:
{"message":"your reply in the customer's language (Finnish or English)","needs_human":false,"internal_notes":"","should_book":false,"should_reschedule":false,"should_cancel":false,"already_inspected":false,"remind_at":"","preferred_site":"","preferred_site_id":"","preferred_date":"","preferred_time":"","customer_name":"","customer_phone":"","vehicle_registration":"","service_type":"katsastus","notes":""}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: '+358449546161', to: '+' + ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), type: 'text', text: { body: $json.output.message } }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Check available inspection time slots for a TJ Katsastus station on a given date. Input: siteId (58=Vaajakoski, 59=Jämsä, 60=Laukaa, 61=Muurame) and date (YYYY-MM-DD). Returns available 15-minute slots.

parameters.query:
UPDATE tj_outbound_sessions
SET last_inbound_at = NOW()
WHERE number = '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND last_inbound_at IS NULL;

UPDATE tj_outbound_sessions
SET stop_reminders = true,
    stop_reason = '{{ ($json.output.already_inspected ? 'already_inspected' : ($json.output.should_book ? 'booked' : ($json.output.should_cancel ? 'cancelled' : 'completed'))).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE number = '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}';

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: '+358449546161', to: '+' + ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), type: 'text', text: { body: 'Pahoittelut, viesti lähetettiin vahingossa väärään numeroon. Voit jättää tämän huomiotta. Hyvää päivänjatkoa!' } }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE tj_outbound_sessions
SET next_reminder_at = '{{ $json.output.remind_at }}'::timestamptz
WHERE number = '{{ ($('Normalize YCloud').first().json.body.from_phone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND stop_reminders = false;
